steps.title: Convert side scale to area scale
steps.content: The side lengths of parallelogram JKLM are $3$ times the corresponding side lengths of parallelogram WXYZ. For similar figures, areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor.

steps.title: Apply the area scale
steps.content:
Use $k=3$ and the original area $4$:
$$4\cdot3^2=4\cdot9=36$$
The area is $36$ square centimeters. The answer is C.
